prose.en: Manage individual identifiers by uniquely identifying each individual as {param:ia-04.04_odp}.

guidance.en: Characteristics that identify the status of individuals include contractors, foreign nationals, and non-organizational users. Identifying the status of individuals by these characteristics provides additional information about the people with whom organizational personnel are communicating. For example, it might be useful for a government employee to know that one of the individuals on an email message is a contractor.

prose.en: individual identifiers are managed by uniquely identifying each individual as {param:ia-04.04_odp}.

objects.en: list of characteristics identifying individual status
Organizational personnel with identifier management responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing identifier management

guidelines.en: characteristics used to identify individual status is defined;
